zotero.abstractNote: We introduce Sourcerer, a framework for estimating source distributions in inverse problems where the forward model is a black-box simulator. Sourcerer leverages the principle of maximum entropy to identify the most parsimonious source distribution consistent with observed data. By utilizing sample-based approximations, we avoid the need for explicit likelihood evaluations, making the method applicable to a wide range of complex simulators. We demonstrate the effectiveness of Sourcerer on several challenging inverse problems, showing that it provides robust and accurate estimates of the underlying source distributions.
zotero.conferenceName: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 37 (NeurIPS 2024)

extra.Editors: A. Globerson and L. Mackey and D. Belgrave and A. Fan and U. Paquet and J. Tomczak and C. Zhang
